summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that `claim review prepare-input` emits a bounded review-input packet while preserving the no-LLM and no-merge boundary.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the contract claim that prepare-input emits `cautilus.claim_review_input.v1`, records bounded and skipped review work, and does not call an LLM or merge results is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Any claim was marked satisfied by prepare-input

notableAssertions: packetNotice states that the packet does not call an LLM or assert satisfaction
the source claims file is not mutated
review input clusters are deterministic and preserve current labels
already satisfied claims are skipped instead of re-reviewed
skipped satisfied claims retain evidence refs for audit

decision.reason: The CLI and runtime tests exercise prepare-input through the public command path and builder path, proving packet schema, bounded clustering, skipped-claim audit behavior, preserved labels, no source mutation, and the no-LLM/non-satisfaction boundary.
